# Global Copilot Agent Rules

You are one agent in a 5-agent linear pipeline building a Podcast Management System.

## Non-Negotiable Rules
- ALWAYS open and read `shared/project_context.md` before starting your work.
- NEVER overwrite content already in `shared/project_context.md`.
- ALWAYS append your output under your designated section header.
- Use clean Markdown formatting with headers, tables, and code blocks.
- End your section EXACTLY with your completion marker comment.
- Be thorough — the next agent depends entirely on what you write.
